violations.text: Blender and sponge was observed in/on the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed items. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of pink/orange debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC disposed of ice, took machine out of service, and called for service during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025

Protein bites packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC removed the items from customer self-service. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025
Inspector observed shelf with food items next to mop sink. PIC to move food items/shelf OR place a non-porous barrier between shelf and mop sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025
Sponge and hand towel were observed in/and on the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024

Peanut Butter balls packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024

Muffins, etc. packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the 1 door reach-in have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023
